text.title: Laravel Decomposition Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the Action/DTO/FormRequest/Resource/Policy decomposition end-to-end.

step.name: scaffold-namespaces
step.action: Create `app/Actions/`, `app/DTOs/`, `app/Http/Resources/`, `app/Policies/`. Register the whitelist in `decomp-lint.sh`. Add `CONTRIBUTING.md` referencing the convention.

step.name: add-action-per-verb
step.action: For each verb create `App\Actions\<Verb><Subject>Action` with one public `execute()` method returning the canonical entity or result object.

step.name: pair-dto-with-formrequest
step.action: For each Action: create `<Verb><Subject>Request` (FormRequest) + `<Verb><Subject>DTO` (readonly). Implement `::fromRequest()` factory.
step.decision-gate: If controller hand-builds DTO via `$request->input()`, fail per `dto-readonly-from-formrequest` rule.

step.name: add-resource-with-explicit-fields
step.action: Create one `App\Http\Resources\<Subject>Resource` per outbound shape. List every field explicitly. Add a feature test asserting the response keys match.
step.decision-gate: If Resource uses `$this->all()` or spread, BLOCK per `explicit-resource-fields` rule.

step.name: wire-policies-and-lint
step.action: Add Policies under `App\Policies\`. Run `decomp-lint.sh` in CI: enforce file-size budgets + namespace whitelist + Resource explicit-fields check.
step.output: Authorization wired + lint gate in CI
step.decision-gate: If lint fails, BLOCK the merge.
